name: MoneyGram
description_short: Los Angeles, CA MoneyGram offers check cashing and money transfers at 214 1/2 W 7th St, open daily 6:30AM–7:30PM.
description_long:
Located at 214 1/2 W 7th St in downtown Los Angeles, CA, this standalone MoneyGram provides convenient check cashing and money transfer services. The location sits in a walkable area accessible to downtown Los Angeles residents and workers. The facility operates seven days a week from 6:30AM to 7:30PM, offering consistent hours to serve the community.

At this W 7th St location in Los Angeles, CA, you can cash checks, send money transfers domestically and internationally, and access other financial services. For specific questions about available services or current rates, call 213-627-8922. The staff can provide details about processing times and any documentation requirements.

Before visiting the 214 1/2 W 7th St MoneyGram in Los Angeles, bring a valid government-issued ID—it's required for check cashing and money transfers. This standalone location is ideal for downtown Los Angeles residents and workers who need quick financial services without the formality of a traditional bank appointment.
pros: 154 documented locations across Los Angeles providing widespread accessibility
Extended operating hours at many locations (some open until 1:30 AM) accommodating shift workers
Dual-channel service model allowing online initiation with in-person completion
Partnership with trusted local retailers and currency exchange businesses embedded in communities
Multiple service options at single locations (check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, bill payment)
International money transfer capability serving immigrant and diaspora communities
No requirement for bank account to access check cashing and money transfer services
cons: MoneyGram's fees for check cashing and wire transfers are typically higher than bank account fees
No credit products, savings accounts, or lending capabilities to build financial security
Service quality and operating hours vary significantly by partner location
No direct customer service relationship—transactions dependent on partner retailer quality and staff knowledge
Online transfer capabilities may require additional verification steps and delays compared to in-person transactions
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers needing immediate check cashing without bank accounts
Shift workers and night-shift employees requiring extended-hours financial services
Consumers in underserved neighborhoods lacking traditional bank branch access
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked consumers and immigrants needing quick check cashing, money orders, or remittance services without a bank account. The main caveat is that fees are significantly higher than traditional banking, and the service does not build credit history or provide long-term financial products—it is strictly a transactional service for immediate cash access and money movement.
services: In-person transaction completion at agent locations
Multi-location service access across Los Angeles
meta_description: Los Angeles MoneyGram at 214 1/2 W 7th St, CA. Check cashing and money transfers, open 6:30AM–7:30PM daily.
